title: Cod in Norwegian-Style Bisque
description: A hearty and flavorful cod dish in a creamy Norwegian-style bisque, perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: 1. In a large pot or Dutch oven, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
4. Add the cod and cook until browned on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
5. Add the Norwegian beer and fish stock, bringing the mixture to a simmer.
6. Reduce heat to low and let simmer for 10-12 minutes, or until the cod is cooked through.
7. If desired, stir in the heavy cream and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve the cod in bowls and spoon the bisque over the top.
10. Garnish with chopped parsley or dill, if desired.
